files.00_Overview.md: Add missing Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways sections. Structure with clear 3W Framework (What/Why/How). Add mermaid diagram showing Time class hierarchy.
files.01_Introduction.md: Heavily redundant with 00_Overview - merge Time class responsibilities content into Overview or refocus purely on getting-started practical usage. Add Learning Objectives. Expand controlDict examples with more parameter explanations.
files.02_Time_Architecture.md: Content is well-structured but excessive OpenFOAM Context notes create clutter. Consolidate Domain markers. Missing clear Learning Objectives. Temporal schemes section good but needs connection to actual fvSchemes configuration examples. GeometricField template section overlaps with Module 5 content - consider referencing rather than duplicating.
files.03_Object_Registry.md: Content is concise and appropriate. Add Learning Objectives section. Missing real-world use case examples (function object access pattern is good but needs expansion). Add performance considerations for lookup operations.
files.04_Functional_Logic.md: Severely misaligned with folder scope - heavy focus on field construction and operator overloading belongs in GeometricFields module. Extract only Time-specific logic (runTime.write() mechanism at end). File name/title mismatch with content. Restructure to focus on write mechanisms, time directory management, and function object execution timing.
files.05_Design_Patterns.md: Redundant with 02_Time_Architecture - duplicates time loop pattern, registry, write control, and function objects. Either merge into 02 or refactor to focus on actual design patterns (RAII, smart pointer usage in Time, registry lifecycle). Current content repeats rather than complements.
files.06_Common_Pitfalls.md: Good practical content but lacks Learning Objectives. Add more pitfalls: purgeWrite misunderstandings, timePrecision issues, runTimeModifiable performance cost, registry memory leaks from manual store(). Each pitfall needs prevention strategies.
files.07_Summary_and_Exercises.md: Exercises are code snippets without actual tasks - transform into hands-on activities with expected outcomes. Add comprehensive summary table linking all files. Missing difficulty progression in exercises.

global_strategy: This module suffers from severe content redundancy and scope drift. Key issues: (1) Files 01, 02, and 05 heavily duplicate time loop, registry, and write control content; (2) File 04 belongs in GeometricFields module (80% off-topic); (3) Inconsistent application of 3W Framework - most files missing Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways; (4) Excessive OpenFOAM Context callouts clutter technical content; (5) Missing progressive skill-building sequence. Strategy: Merge 01 into 00 (basics), combine 02 and 05 (architecture+patterns), move field-specific content from 04 to GeometricFields module, expand 06 with more runtime issues, redesign 07 exercises as hands-on challenges.
